mapper.insert: insert into sys_invest_order (order_no, client_req_no, user_id, user_name, product_id, product_name, currency, group_mode, invest_amount, single_rate, group_rate, effective_rate, cycle_days, expected_income, contract_no, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{orderNo}, #{clientReqNo}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{currency}, #{groupMode}, #{investAmount}, #{singleRate}, #{groupRate}, #{effectiveRate}, #{cycleDays}, #{expectedIncome}, #{contractNo}, '0', #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})

insert into sys_invest_contract_sign (contract_no, order_no, user_id, product_id, contract_text, signature_data, agreed, sign_time, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{contractNo}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{contractText}, #{signatureData}, #{agreed}, #{signTime}, '1', #{createBy}, now())

insert into sys_invest_order_plan (order_id, product_id, user_id, plan_type, stage_no, plan_time, plan_rate, plan_amount, status, create_time, remark) values (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{userId}, #{planType}, #{stageNo}, #{planTime}, #{planRate}, #{planAmount}, '0', now(), #{remark})
mapper.select: select order_id from sys_invest_order where order_no = #{orderNo} limit 1

select sign_id as signId, signature_data as signatureData, agreed, sign_time as signTime from sys_invest_contract_sign where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId} and status = '1' and agreed = '1' order by sign_time desc, sign_id desc limit 1

select order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, product_id as productId, product_name as productName, currency, invest_amount as investAmount, effective_rate as effectiveRate, expected_income as expectedIncome, cycle_days as cycleDays, status, create_time as createTime, date_add(create_time, interval ifnull(cycle_days, 0) day) as endTime from sys_invest_order where user_id = #{userId}
and status = '0' and date_add(create_time, interval ifnull(cycle_days, 0) day) > now()
and (status = '1' or date_add(create_time, interval ifnull(cycle_days, 0) day) <= now())
order by create_time desc

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when status = '0' and date_add(create_time, interval ifnull(cycle_days, 0) day) > now() then 1 else 0 end) as runningCount, sum(case when status = '1' or date_add(create_time, interval ifnull(cycle_days, 0) day) <= now() then 1 else 0 end) as endedCount from sys_invest_order where user_id = #{userId}

select p.plan_id as planId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.product_name as productName, o.currency, p.plan_type as planType, p.plan_amount as planAmount, p.status, p.plan_time as planTime, p.exec_time as execTime, p.update_time as updateTime from sys_invest_order_plan p left join sys_invest_order o on o.order_id = p.order_id where p.user_id = #{userId} and p.plan_type = 'INTEREST' order by p.plan_time desc, p.plan_id desc

select sum(case when p.plan_type = 'INTEREST' and p.status = '1' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as receivedInterest, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'INTEREST' and p.status = '0' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as pendingInterest, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'PRINCIPAL' and p.status = '1' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as receivedPrincipal, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'PRINCIPAL' and p.status = '0' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as pendingPrincipal from sys_invest_order_plan p where p.user_id = #{userId}

select o.currency, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'INTEREST' and p.status = '1' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as receivedInterest, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'INTEREST' and p.status = '0' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as pendingInterest, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'PRINCIPAL' and p.status = '1' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as receivedPrincipal, sum(case when p.plan_type = 'PRINCIPAL' and p.status = '0' then ifnull(p.plan_amount, 0) else 0 end) as pendingPrincipal from sys_invest_order_plan p left join sys_invest_order o on o.order_id = p.order_id where p.user_id = #{userId} group by o.currency

select order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, product_id as productId, product_name as productName, currency, invest_amount as investAmount, effective_rate as effectiveRate, expected_income as expectedIncome, cycle_days as cycleDays, status, create_time as createTime, date_add(create_time, interval ifnull(cycle_days, 0) day) as endTime, remark from sys_invest_order where 1 = 1
and order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and user_id = #{userId}
and user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by order_id desc

select order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, product_id as productId, product_name as productName, currency, invest_amount as investAmount, effective_rate as effectiveRate, expected_income as expectedIncome, cycle_days as cycleDays, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, remark from sys_invest_order where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1

select plan_id as planId, order_id as orderId, user_id as userId, plan_type as planType, stage_no as stageNo, plan_time as planTime, plan_rate as planRate, plan_amount as planAmount, status, exec_time as execTime, remark from sys_invest_order_plan where order_id = #{orderId} order by stage_no asc, plan_id asc
select * from sys_invest_order where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1 for update
select * from sys_invest_order_plan where order_id = #{orderId} and status = '0' order by plan_time asc, plan_id asc
mapper.update: update sys_invest_order_plan set status = '2', update_time = now(), remark = case when #{remark} is null or #{remark} = '' then remark else #{remark} end where order_id = #{orderId} and status = '0'

update sys_invest_order set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remark = case when #{remark} is null or #{remark} = '' then remark else #{remark} end where order_id = #{orderId}

update sys_invest_order_plan set status = #{status}, exec_time = #{execTime}, update_time = now(), remark = case when #{remark} is null or #{remark} = '' then remark else #{remark} end where plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_invest_order_plan where order_id = #{orderId} and status = '0'

select p.plan_id as planId, p.order_id as orderId, p.user_id as userId, p.plan_type as planType, p.plan_amount as planAmount, p.plan_time as planTime, o.order_no as orderNo, o.user_name as userName, o.currency, o.product_id as productId, o.product_name as productName, o.invest_amount as investAmount from sys_invest_order_plan p inner join sys_invest_order o on o.order_id = p.order_id where p.status = '0' and p.plan_time <= #{now} and o.status = '0' order by p.plan_time asc, p.plan_id asc
select * from sys_invest_order_plan where plan_id = #{planId} limit 1 for update
